notes: Brandon's Estuary 7 template, commercialized · 2048 · the only stick on the shelf from Vol 7's present.  Tem buys a copy and adds it after Chapter 22.

shelf.shelf_condition: new · the case is a reproduction of a 2004 case, made of better plastic than 2004 could make, which is exactly what is wrong with it
shelf.provenance_note: Tem bought it after recognizing the beach.  It is The Tideline's beach, licensed, with measurement tools.  Tem is not sure how to feel about this and neither is anyone else.
shelf.in_fiction_dev_note: Meridian licensed the Oneironautics catalog in 2041.  Tideline Survey retains Rocha's beach geometry byte-for-byte and adds erosion telemetry, species counts, restoration scoring.  The last line of the original is present, but it is now a menu option.

acts_deferred_note: Playable content authoring deferred.  Only visible on the shelf at Vol 7 Chapter 22+.
